description: Create comprehensive domain architecture visualization of AARSD1 isoforms showing AlaX editing domain, zinc-binding sites, and p23H domain
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(4, 1, figsize=(14, 10), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [1.5, 1.5, 1.5, 2]})

# Color scheme
colors = {
    'alax_editing': '#2E86AB',     # Blue - AlaX editing domain
    'beta_barrel': '#A23B72',      # Purple - Translation beta-barrel
    'tRNA_SAD': '#F18F01',         # Orange - tRNA_SAD domain
    'p23H': '#C73E1D',             # Red - p23 homolog
    'extended_nterm': '#8B8B8B',   # Gray - extended N-terminus  
    'c_term': '#3B7A57',           # Green - C-terminal extension
    'zinc': '#FFD700',             # Gold - zinc binding sites
    'unique_nterm': '#D4A5A5',     # Light pink - unique N-terminal of iso1
}

def draw_protein(ax, domains, protein_length, title, zinc_sites=None, labels=None):
    ax.set_xlim(0, 600)
    ax.set_ylim(-0.5, 1.5)
    ax.set_yticks([])
    
    # Draw protein backbone
    scale = 550 / protein_length
    backbone_start = 25
    
    ax.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch(
        (backbone_start, 0.3), protein_length * scale, 0.4,
        boxstyle="round,pad=0.02", facecolor='#f0f0f0', edgecolor='gray', linewidth=0.5
    ))
    
    # Draw domains
    for name, start, end, color, label in domains:
        width = (end - start + 1) * scale
        x = backbone_start + (start - 1) * scale
        ax.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch(
            (x, 0.25), width, 0.5,
            boxstyle="round,pad=0.02", facecolor=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=1, alpha=0.85
        ))
        # Label
        center_x = x + width / 2
        ax.text(center_x, 0.5, label, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold', color='white')
    
    # Draw zinc binding sites
    if zinc_sites:
        for pos, residue in zinc_sites:
            x = backbone_start + (pos - 1) * scale
            ax.plot(x, 1.0, 'v', color=colors['zinc'], markersize=8, markeredgecolor='black', markeredgewidth=0.5)
            ax.text(x, 1.15, f'{residue}{pos}', ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=6, fontweight='bold')
    
    # Title and length markers
    ax.text(backbone_start - 5, 0.5, title, ha='right', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')
    ax.text(backbone_start, -0.1, '1', ha='center', fontsize=7)
    ax.text(backbone_start + protein_length * scale, -0.1, str(protein_length), ha='center', fontsize=7)
    
    ax.set_frame_on(False)
    ax.set_xticks([])

# Isoform 1 (canonical, 412 aa)
domains_iso1 = [
    ('unique_nterm', 1, 13, colors['unique_nterm'], 'N'),
    ('beta_barrel', 2, 95, colors['beta_barrel'], 'β-barrel'),
    ('alax_editing', 43, 252, colors['alax_editing'], 'AlaX Editing Domain'),
    ('tRNA_SAD', 196, 239, colors['tRNA_SAD'], 'SAD'),
    ('c_term', 253, 412, colors['c_term'], 'C-terminal (C-Ala-like)'),
]
zinc_iso1 = [(109, 'H'), (113, 'H'), (209, 'C'), (213, 'H')]

draw_protein(axes[0], domains_iso1, 412, 'Isoform 1\n(412 aa)', zinc_iso1)
axes[0].set_title('AARSD1 Domain Architecture & Catalytic Residues', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', pad=15)

# Isoform 2 (525 aa, p23H + AlaXp)
domains_iso2 = [
    ('p23H', 1, 126, colors['p23H'], 'p23-Homolog (CS)'),
    ('beta_barrel', 115, 208, colors['beta_barrel'], 'β-barrel'),
    ('alax_editing', 156, 365, colors['alax_editing'], 'AlaX Editing Domain'),
    ('tRNA_SAD', 309, 352, colors['tRNA_SAD'], 'SAD'),
    ('c_term', 366, 525, colors['c_term'], 'C-terminal'),
]
draw_protein(axes[1], domains_iso2, 525, 'Isoform 2\n(525 aa)')

# Isoform 3 (586 aa)
domains_iso3 = [
    ('extended_nterm', 1, 61, colors['extended_nterm'], 'Ext'),
    ('p23H', 62, 187, colors['p23H'], 'p23-Homolog (CS)'),
    ('alax_editing', 217, 426, colors['alax_editing'], 'AlaX Editing Domain'),
    ('c_term', 427, 586, colors['c_term'], 'C-terminal'),
]
draw_protein(axes[2], domains_iso3, 586, 'Isoform 3\n(586 aa)')

# Bottom panel: Key findings summary
ax = axes[3]
ax.set_xlim(0, 1)
ax.set_ylim(0, 1)
ax.set_frame_on(False)
ax.set_xticks([])
ax.set_yticks([])

findings = [
    ("✓ CONSERVED", "Zinc-binding HxxxH (H109, H113) and CxxxH (C209, H213) motifs", '#2E86AB'),
    ("✓ CONSERVED", "AlaX editing domain architecture (IPR018165, AlaX-L subfamily)", '#2E86AB'),
    ("✓ ACTIVE", "Isoform 1 (AlaXp only) has Ser-tRNA(Ala) deacylase activity in vitro", '#2E86AB'),
    ("✗ INACTIVE", "Isoform 2 (p23H+AlaXp fusion) is catalytically INACTIVE", '#C73E1D'),
    ("✗ ABSENT", "No TPR domain in any isoform → no direct HSP90 binding module", '#C73E1D'),
    ("● NOTE", "p23H is CS-domain homolog (not TPR); regulates editing in cis/trans", '#F18F01'),
]

for i, (status, text, color) in enumerate(findings):
    y = 0.85 - i * 0.14
    ax.text(0.02, y, status, fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color=color, va='center')
    ax.text(0.17, y, text, fontsize=9, va='center', color='#333333')

# Legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=colors['alax_editing'], label='AlaX Editing Domain'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=colors['beta_barrel'], label='Translation β-barrel'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=colors['tRNA_SAD'], label='tRNA_SAD'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=colors['p23H'], label='p23-Homolog (CS domain)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=colors['c_term'], label='C-terminal extension'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=colors['zinc'], label='Zinc-binding residues'),
]
fig.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower center', ncol=3, fontsize=8, frameon=True, bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, -0.02))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('aarsd1_domain_architecture.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Domain architecture figure saved.")
